title: jasminum humile f. farreri
intro: Jasminum humile f. farreri, also known as the Star Jasmine or Chinese Star Jasmine, is a fragrant, evergreen climbing plant native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Jasminum humile f. farreri include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as nausea and diarrhea. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
